name: claudecode
description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.
author: Anthropic <support@anthropic.com>

scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.AUTHORIZED) { console.error('ERROR: Direct publishing is not allowed.\nPlease see the release workflow documentation to publish this package.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build:bun: bun run build:command-bundle && bun run patch:cli-sidecar && bun scripts/bun-build.mjs --published
scripts.compile:bun: bun run build:command-bundle && bun run patch:cli-sidecar && bun scripts/bun-build.mjs --compile --published
scripts.rebuild:local: bun run compile:bun && bun run install:local
scripts.index:status: cat .code_index/index/manifest.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'No index found. Run /index first.'
